sections.name: Section I: Free-Response
sections.quote: Section I: Free-Response — 3 Questions | 65–70 Minutes | 50% of Score

parts.name: Question 1: Project Presentation
parts.toolNote: 3 minutes to prepare; 3 minutes to present
parts.quote: Question 1: Project Presentation: 20% of Score — Students deliver a presentation in response to the project prompt about what they learned through their research. (3 minutes to prepare; 3 minutes to present.)

parts.name: Question 2: Project Q&A
parts.toolNote: responding to 4 pre-recorded questions, 40 seconds per response
parts.quote: Question 2: Project Q&A: 15% of Score — Students participate in a question-and-answer exchange about their project and research by responding to 4 pre-recorded questions (40 seconds per response)

parts.name: Question 3: Argumentative Essay
parts.toolNote: 55 minutes, including 2 opportunities to listen to audio
parts.quote: Question 3: Argumentative Essay: 15% of Score — Students write an essay based on accompanying sources (print and audio) that present different viewpoints. (55 minutes, including 2 opportunities to listen to audio.)

sections.name: Section II: Multiple-Choice
sections.quote: Section II: Multiple-Choice — 55 Questions | 80 Minutes | 50% of Score

parts.name: Part A: Listening
parts.quote: Part A: Listening: 25 questions; 40 minutes; 25% of Score

parts.name: Part B: Reading
parts.quote: Part B: Reading: 30 questions; 40 minutes; 25% of Score

datasetDiscrepancies.quote: Section II: Multiple-Choice — 55 Questions | 80 Minutes | 50% of Score
